hero_title: Compliance Control Layer for Digital Assets
hero_subtitle: SFTY connects provider outputs into a secure, role-based compliance workflow designed to meet institutional trust standards for auditability and bank due diligence.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling
trust_card_5_value: Regulatory changes mapped to internal rule
trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_description: Procurement teams and compliance leaders face uncertain control over access, audit logs, and evidence integrity without a unified deployment model. This creates challenges in demonstrating audit readiness, meeting institutional requirements, and preparing bank due diligence packages with confidence.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY integrates role-based access, audit logs, evidence preservation and governance controls into a unified operating model that supports institutional trust and delivers audit-ready bank due diligence packages.
workflow_title: From access permissions to audit evidence
workflow_description: SFTY manages role-based access and permissions, structures activity logs, preserves evidence integrity and supports securely auditable compliance workflows for enterprise readiness.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_description: SFTY provides a compliance layer designed for procurement confidence by preserving audit evidence, enforcing role-based access, and supporting secure, traceable compliance operations.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY supports VASPs with a controlled compliance layer that preserves evidence integrity, enables provider orchestration and prepares bank-ready due diligence within enterprise-grade deployments.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance
ask_sfty_placeholder: How can SFTY support procurement-safe compliance workflows
ask_sfty_chip_1_message: Explain how role-based access preserves audit trail integrity
ask_sfty_chip_2_message: Show how evidence packages support bank due diligence reviews
ask_sfty_chip_3_message: Describe secure deployment options for regulated VASP environments
ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for enterprise compliance?
faq_1_answer: SFTY provides a compliance control layer connecting KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule, screening, policies, cases and reporting into one auditable workflow for regulated digital asset businesses.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY manage compliance workflows?
faq_2_answer: SFTY structures provider outputs into case-based workflows, applies internal rules, supports review routing, decision logging, evidence collection and report preparation within a single compliance operating model.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit-ready evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves decision logs, case history, provider results and regulatory change records to support transparent audit readiness and defensible compliance review processes.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing providers?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY connects existing KYC, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers, integrating their outputs without replacing them to form a connected compliance layer.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace current compliance providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY does not replace compliance providers but works above them to connect their outputs into structured workflows, evidence and scalable compliance operations.
final_description: Explore how SFTY enables secure role-based access, audit trails and governance for enterprise-ready digital asset compliance.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
footer_contact_title: For supervisory, compliance and deployment discussions.
footer_legal_notice: This page is for informational purposes only and does not constitute legal, regulatory or compliance advice. SFTY deployment depends on jurisdiction, client requirements and applicable laws.
